json.title: Spanish A
json.description:
**IB Spanish A (Literature)** is a **Group 1** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **Spanish literary texts across different genres, periods, and cultures, literary analysis techniques, comparative studies, and cultural contexts**, with a strong focus on **close textual analysis, critical thinking, interpretation of literary devices, and understanding the interaction between language, culture, and meaning in Spanish literature**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2026**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Paper 1** | Guided textual analysis | 1h 15m | 1h 15m | 35% |
| **Paper 2** | Comparative essay | 1h 45m | 2h 15m | 35% (SL), 25% (HL) |
| **Individual Oral** | Internal assessment | 15 minutes | 15 minutes | 30% (SL), 20% (HL) |

childTopics.title: Análisis de la pregunta del Prueba 2
Estrategias para superar con éxito el Prueba 2
Encontrar ideas: Lluvia de ideas y mapas mentales

Habilidad 2: Profundizar en el análisis y el perfeccionamiento
Guía paso a paso hacia la excelencia
